body: What albums have you all been listening to this week? I need new music recommendations.
Been on a jazz kick lately. Coltrane's A Love Supreme is hitting different this time around.
I've been listening to Bjork's Homogenic on repeat. The way she blends electronic and orchestral is genius.
Love both of those! Any newer artists? I feel like I'm stuck in the classics.
Check out Floating Points — especially the Promises album with Pharoah Sanders. It's beautiful ambient jazz.
